meta_title: For Students: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't scale projects (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't scale projects. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Skills: Scale Your Student AI Projects
content.seo_description: Stop struggling to scale student projects. Learn to master Claude Code and Antigravity with this expert-led, intermediate-level checklist for AI builders.
content.answer_block: To scale your projects, you must transition from manual coding to AI-assisted orchestration. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you automate boilerplate, enforce architectural consistency, and offload complex refactoring. This setup transforms your workflow, allowing you to ship high-quality features faster while mastering the industry-standard tools for professional AI development.
content.intro:
You started with a simple script, but now your codebase is a tangled mess of spaghetti logic that breaks every time you add a feature. The 'student trap' is real: you have the vision, but your manual development process can't keep up with the complexity of modern, scalable AI applications. You're hitting a wall because you're coding like it's 2015, while the industry has moved to AI-first engineering.

Relief is here. By mastering the synergy between Claude Code and Antigravity, you stop fighting the compiler and start orchestrating intelligence. This isn't just about writing code faster; it's about building a robust, modular infrastructure that grows with your ambition. This checklist is your blueprint to moving from a struggling student to a formidable AI builder.

steps.title: Architectural Foundation Setup
steps.description: Establish a clean project structure that AI agents can navigate easily, ensuring modularity from line one.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project directory and propose a scalable folder structure optimized for a React + FastAPI stack, ensuring separation of concerns.

steps.title: Automated Dependency Management
steps.description: Use Claude Code to audit and prune unused dependencies that bloat your build and cause version conflicts.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Identify unused packages in package.json and suggest the cleanest path to migrate to a monorepo structure.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'audit dependencies and remove unused packages'

steps.title: Implementing Robust Error Handling
steps.description: Scale your project by moving from 'happy path' coding to production-grade error management.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor my API service layer to include global error handling and typed logging patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement robust error handling in src/services'

steps.title: Streamlined CI/CD Pipeline Integration
steps.description: Automate your testing and deployment so you can focus on building features rather than manual debugging.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a GitHub Actions workflow that runs linting and unit tests on every pull request.

steps.title: Intelligent Refactoring Loops
steps.description: Use iterative feedback to optimize performance bottlenecks identified during early testing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review my database query logic and suggest indexing strategies for 10x performance improvement.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'refactor database queries for performance'

pro_tips: Always define your coding standards in a .claudeprompt file at the root to ensure consistent output quality.
Use Claude Code to explain code you didn't write; it's the fastest way to learn complex library internals.
Treat your AI agent as a junior developer: provide clear context and small, discrete tasks rather than massive refactors.
Leverage Antigravity to generate documentation as you code, keeping your README synced with your feature set.
Prioritize 'agentic' debugging by asking Claude Code to write a failing test case before writing the fix.
resources: Best Practices for AI Engineering: https://ai-engineering-guide.com
content.next_steps: After completing these steps, deploy your app to a staging environment and run a performance audit to validate your scaling improvements.
content.conversion_block: Ready to turn your prototype into a production-ready SaaS? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
